Name: AbstractSecurity
Author: Abstract Security - Solutions Engineering
Description: The **Abstract Security** solution turns the Abstract Security data pipeline into a first-class, actionable Microsoft Sentinel integration. Abstract delivers normalized, enriched, cost-reduced security telemetry into Sentinel via the Logs Ingestion API, and this solution makes that data discoverable and bidirectional: a branded data connector, an ASIM parser, analytics rules, hunting queries, a pipeline-overview workbook, SOAR playbooks, and a Security Copilot plugin + agent that call the Abstract API to close the loop (triage in Sentinel, act on the pipeline).
